Data.Message:
Job 'aabb1122-3344-5566-7788-99aabbccdd00' failed to start. Could not start executor. Logon failed for user UIPATH\USER1. The user name or password is incorrect. (0x0000052E). Last error: 131092. RDP connection failed.
   at UiPath.Robot.Service.SessionManager.CreateSessionAsync(LogonRequest request)
   at UiPath.Robot.Service.JobManager.StartJobAsync(JobStartRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)

[Robot] Windows logon attempt for UIPATH\USER1 on MOCK-HOST rejected by LSA. NTSTATUS=0xC000006D (STATUS_LOGON_FAILURE). Sub-status=0xC000006A (wrong password). Account is NOT locked. Caller: UiPath Robot service (unattended).
